title: JD Vance calls Iran ceasefire a 'fragile truce' and says Trump is 'impatient to make progress'
summary_full: The U.S. vice president said the response from Iran to the ceasefire had varied, with some 'lying about even the fragile truce that we've already struck.'
summary_public: The U.S. vice president said the response from Iran to the ceasefire had varied, with some 'lying about even the fragile truce that we've already struck.'
